files.content_head:
import time

from exports import api

POLL_INTERVAL_SECONDS = 2


async def wait_for_export(job_id):
    while True:
        job = await api.get_job(job_id)
        if job["state"] in ("done", "failed"):
            return job
        time.sleep(POLL_INTERVAL_SECONDS)
